unsupported_api_policy: Fixtures must record unsupported APIs only when the fixture source reaches them; each recorded API must include the manifest API name and issue number.

fixtures.title: Top-down movement with blocking collision
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: A player object moves horizontally, stops before a solid wall, bounces from the wall, and reports rectangle collision hits using object selectors.
expected_godot_assertions: Generated object scripts register instances through GMRuntime.
Motion helpers preserve speed, direction, hspeed, vspeed, gravity, snap, contact, and bounce state.
Collision queries resolve the expected wall instance and noone misses.

fixtures.title: Multi-room transition and persistent lifecycle
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: A persistent controller starts in r_one, transitions to r_two, restarts, returns to r_one, and records room start/end lifecycle callbacks.
expected_godot_assertions: Generated room scenes expose GameMaker room width, height, order, and persistent metadata.
GMRuntime room_goto_next, room_restart, and room_goto_previous update current_scene and room builtins.
Persistent nodes survive transitions and receive expected lifecycle callbacks.

fixtures.title: Draw text through an offscreen surface
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: The Draw event writes text, clears a surface target, resets the target stack, and draws the surface back to the application target.
expected_godot_assertions: Generated Draw events are wrapped in GMRuntime draw begin/end context.
Text and sprite draw calls lower through the draw runtime.
Surface targets can be created, cleared, copied, drawn, and freed under headless Godot.

fixtures.title: Imported sound playback and legacy aliases
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: A sound asset plays on its audio group, exposes a live handle, accepts gain/pitch changes, and can be stopped through modern and legacy APIs.
expected_godot_assertions: Sound registry metadata selects the expected AudioServer bus.
audio_play_sound returns distinct handles that resolve to AudioStreamPlayer nodes.
Modern audio helpers and legacy aliases agree on playing/stopped state.

fixtures.title: Collections, text files, INI, and JSON saves
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: A save routine builds DS list/map/grid state, serializes it to text and JSON, and persists/reloads INI settings under the sandboxed save path.
expected_godot_assertions: Sequential, map, and grid data structures preserve inserted values.
Text files, included files, directories, and GameMaker-style path helpers map to Godot user/data paths.
INI writes persist across close/open and JSON encode/decode sanitizes unsupported numeric values.

fixtures.title: HTTP requests bridged into async_load
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: HTTP GET/POST/PUT and async buffer save produce request IDs and Async events with populated async_load payloads.
expected_godot_assertions: Local HTTP server responses are routed to generated async HTTP handlers.
buffer_save_async dispatches Async Save/Load payloads.
Manual async dispatch reaches generated dialog handler surfaces without network access.

fixtures.title: Legacy view arrays synchronized with camera helpers
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: A camera assigned through legacy view arrays or view slot functions stays synchronized with camera setters/getters, Camera2D transform, view-surface state, active camera state, and GUI display size helpers.
expected_godot_assertions: view_xview/view_yview writes update the backing camera state.
view_set_camera/view_get_camera and camera_apply/camera_get_active preserve camera handles.
view_set_surface_id/view_get_surface_id preserve surface assignments and support clearing.
camera_set_view_pos, camera_set_view_size, and camera_set_view_angle update Camera2D state.
display_set_gui_size is visible through display_get_gui_width/height.

fixtures.title: Multi-view viewport state and diagnostics
fixtures.game_maker_expectation: Two visible views preserve viewport rectangles, convert window mouse coordinates through the selected view, and store view_surface_id while reporting the unsupported render-backed SubViewport behavior.
expected_godot_assertions: Converted Camera2D metadata initializes view visibility and viewport rectangles.
view_set_xport/yport/wport/hport update runtime state.
window_view_mouse_get_x/y convert through view viewport and view rectangle scale.
GUI mouse conversion remains available while multi-view compatibility state is active.
Multiple active views and view_surface_id assignments record deterministic backend diagnostics.

unsupported_api_issue_refs.note: Render-to-surface view backends are stored as compatibility state until a custom SubViewport renderer exists.
